name: hicplot

metadata.name: HiCPlot
metadata.summary: plot heatmaps from Hi-C matrix and tracks from bigwig files

documentation: plot heatmaps from Hi-C matrix and tracks from bigwig files

functions.name: HiCPlot.NGStrack.get_track_min_max
documentation:
Compute the minimum and maximum values for BigWig tracks per type to ensure consistent y-axis scaling.

Parameters:
- bigwig_files_sample1: List of BigWig files for sample 1.
- bigwig_labels_sample1: List of labels corresponding to BigWig files for sample 1.
- bigwig_files_sample2: List of BigWig files for sample 2.
- bigwig_labels_sample2: List of labels corresponding to BigWig files for sample 2.
- layoutid: Layout type ('horizontal' or 'vertical').
- region: Tuple containing (chromosome, start, end).

Returns:
- type_min_max: Dictionary with BigWig types as keys and (min, max) tuples as values.

functions.name: HiCPlot.NGStrack.plot_genes
documentation:
Plot gene lines for all genes in the region.
Annotate only the specified genes with their names.

Parameters:
- ax: Matplotlib axis to plot on.
- gtf_file: Path to the GTF file.
- region: Tuple (chromosome, start, end).
- genes: List of gene names to annotate. If None, no annotations.
- color: Color for gene lines and exons.
- track_height: Height of each gene track.

functions.name: HiCPlot.NGStrack.read_bigwig
documentation: Read BigWig or bedGraph file and return positions and values.

functions.name: HiCPlot.NGStrack.plot_bed
documentation: Plot BED file annotations on the given axis.

functions.name: HiCPlot.NGStrack.plot_seq
documentation: Plot RNA-seq/ChIP-seq expression from BigWig or bedGraph file on given axis.

functions.name: HiCPlot.NGStrack.plot_tracks
documentation:
Plot BigWig, BED, and GTF tracks with customizable layout.

Parameters:
- bigwig_files_sample1: List of BigWig file paths for sample 1.
- bigwig_labels_sample1: List of labels for BigWig tracks of sample 1.
- colors_sample1: List of colors for BigWig tracks of sample 1.
- bigwig_files_sample2: List of BigWig file paths for sample 2.
- bigwig_labels_sample2: List of labels for BigWig tracks of sample 2.
- colors_sample2: List of colors for BigWig tracks of sample 2.
- bed_files_sample1: List of BED file paths for sample 1.
- bed_labels_sample1: List of labels for BED tracks of sample 1.
- bed_files_sample2: List of BED file paths for sample 2.
- bed_labels_sample2: List of labels for BED tracks of sample 2.
- gtf_file: Path to the GTF file for gene annotations.
- genes_to_annotate: List of gene names to annotate.
- chrid: Chromosome ID.
- start: Start position of the region.
- end: End position of the region.
- cmap: Colormap for plots.
- vmin: Minimum value for scaling.
- vmax: Maximum value for scaling.
- output_file: Filename for the saved PDF.
- layout: 'horizontal' or 'vertical'.
- track_width: Width of each track in inches.
- track_height: Height of each track in inches.
- track_spacing: Spacing between tracks in inches.

modules.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

functions.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap.plot_genes
documentation:
Plot gene annotations on the given axis.
Annotate only the specified genes with their names.

Parameters:
- ax: Matplotlib axis to plot on.
- gtf_file: Path to the GTF file.
- region: Tuple (chromosome, start, end).
- genes_to_annotate: List of gene names to annotate. If None, no annotations.
- color: Color for gene lines and exons.
- track_height: Height of each gene track.

functions.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap.read_bigwig
documentation: Read BigWig or bedGraph file and return positions and values.

functions.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap.get_track_min_max
documentation:
Compute the minimum and maximum values for BigWig tracks per type to ensure consistent y-axis scaling.

Parameters:
- bigwig_files_sample1: List of BigWig files for sample 1.
- bigwig_labels_sample1: List of labels corresponding to BigWig files for sample 1.
- bigwig_files_sample2: List of BigWig files for sample 2.
- bigwig_labels_sample2: List of labels corresponding to BigWig files for sample 2.
- region: Tuple containing (chromosome, start, end).

Returns:
- type_min_max: Dictionary with BigWig types as keys and (min, max) tuples as values.

functions.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap.plot_seq
documentation: Plot RNA-seq/ChIP-seq expression from BigWig or bedGraph file on given axis.

functions.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap.plot_bed
documentation: Plot BED file annotations on the given axis.

functions.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap.plot_loops
documentation:
Plot chromatin loops as arcs on the given axis.

Parameters:
- ax: Matplotlib axis to plot on.
- loop_file: Path to the loop file.
- region: Tuple (chromosome, start, end).
- color: Color for the loop arcs.
- alpha: Transparency level for the arcs.
- linewidth: Width of the arc lines.
- label: Label for the loop track (sample name).

functions.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap.pcolormesh_square
documentation: Plot the difference matrix as a heatmap on the given axis.

functions.name: HiCPlot.DiffSquHeatmap.plot_heatmaps
documentation:
Plot the difference heatmap along with BigWig, BED tracks, gene annotations, and chromatin loops.

Parameters:
- All parameters are as defined in the function signature.

modules.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.plot_genes
documentation:
Plot gene annotations on the given axis.
Annotate only the specified genes with their names.

Parameters:
- ax: Matplotlib axis to plot on.
- gtf_file: Path to the GTF file.
- region: Tuple (chromosome, start, end).
- genes_to_annotate: List of gene names to annotate. If None, no annotations.
- color: Color for gene lines and exons.
- track_height: Height of each gene track.

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.read_bigwig
documentation:
Read BigWig or bedGraph file and return positions and values.

Parameters:
- file_path: Path to the BigWig or bedGraph file.
- region: Tuple containing (chromosome, start, end).

Returns:
- positions: Numpy array of positions.
- values: Numpy array of values.

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.get_track_min_max
documentation:
Compute the minimum and maximum values for BigWig tracks per type to ensure consistent y-axis scaling.

Parameters:
- bigwig_files_sample1: List of BigWig files for sample 1.
- bigwig_labels_sample1: List of labels corresponding to BigWig files for sample 1.
- bigwig_files_sample2: List of BigWig files for sample 2.
- bigwig_labels_sample2: List of labels corresponding to BigWig files for sample 2.
- layoutid: Layout type ('horizontal' or 'vertical').
- region: Tuple containing (chromosome, start, end).

Returns:
- type_min_max: Dictionary with BigWig types as keys and (min, max) tuples as values.

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.plot_seq
documentation:
Plot RNA-seq/ChIP-seq expression from BigWig or bedGraph file on the given axis.

Parameters:
- ax: Matplotlib axis to plot on.
- file_path: Path to the BigWig or bedGraph file.
- region: Tuple containing (chromosome, start, end).
- color: Color for the plot.
- y_min: Minimum y-axis value.
- y_max: Maximum y-axis value.

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.plot_bed
documentation:
Plot BED regions as rectangles on the given axis.

Parameters:
- ax: Matplotlib axis to plot on.
- bed_file: Path to the BED file.
- region: Tuple containing (chromosome, start, end).
- color: Color for the BED regions.
- label: Label for the BED track.

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.plot_loops
documentation:
Plot chromatin loops as arcs on the given axis.

Parameters:
- ax: Matplotlib axis to plot on.
- loop_file: Path to the loop file.
- region: Tuple (chromosome, start, end).
- color: Color for the loop arcs.
- alpha: Transparency level for the arcs.
- linewidth: Width of the arc lines.
- label: Label for the loop track (sample name).

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.pcolormesh_triangle
documentation:
Plot the Hi-C matrix as a triangular heatmap on the given axis.

Parameters:
- ax: Matplotlib axis to plot on.
- matrix: Hi-C contact matrix.
- start: Start position for the x-axis.
- resolution: Resolution of the Hi-C matrix.
- vmin: Minimum value for color scaling.
- vmax: Maximum value for color scaling.
- cmap: Colormap for the heatmap.

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.plot_heatmaps
documentation:
Plot Hi-C heatmaps along with BigWig, BED, and gene annotations.

Parameters:
- All parameters correspond to command-line arguments.

functions.name: HiCPlot.TriHeatmap.main
documentation: Main function to parse command-line arguments and initiate plotting.
